name: Summer Circus Spectacular
blurb: The Ringling and the Circus Arts Conservatory team up for their annual family showcase in the air-conditioned Historic Asolo Theater, with jugglers, roller skaters, hand balancers and a clown under Ringmaster Ashley Vargas. A perfect midday escape from the summer heat. Tickets run $15–$20.

name: The Last Romance
blurb: A tender late-in-life love story opens at Florida Studio Theatre in downtown Sarasota, where a chance encounter at a dog park rekindles one man's romantic spirit. A warm, crowd-pleasing summer comedy just steps from Main Street. Tickets start around $29.

name: Sarasota Farmers Market
venue: Downtown Sarasota — Lemon Ave & Main St
blurb: Downtown Sarasota's beloved open-air market fills Lemon Avenue and Main Street every Saturday with local produce, fresh flowers, baked goods, seafood and artisan vendors. A free, walkable way to take the pulse of the city. Rain or shine, 7 AM to 1 PM.

name: Siesta Key Drum Circle
blurb: A Siesta Key tradition: drummers, dancers and onlookers gather on the powder-white sand just south of the pavilion for a free, spontaneous jam as the sun sets over the Gulf. Bring a chair, a drum, or just come to watch. Begins about an hour before sundown each Sunday.
